repo_prior_art.cite: ThmSmith/doc/API.md §3 records empty ExactID/PartialID catalogue; no in-catalogue DML/LRO/ADML ATE entry

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML + ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO + ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML: standard orthogonal/common-EIF first-order inference under correct specification and product-rate conditions

repo_prior_art.cite: none; closest cited entries eid_bjs_efficient_event_study, eid_lp_svar_nonequiv, and pid_offline_policy_joint_misspec are analogue frontiers, not unconfounded ATE DML/LRO/ADML

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML, ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO, ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML, ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022RR, ChernozhukovNeweyQuintasMartinezSyrgkanis2024RieszRegression, Singh2024KRRR: no verified source gives an iff spectral pairwise DML/LRO/ADML frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: none; eid_lp_svar_nonequiv has a primitive witness template in another cluster, not a DML/LRO/ADML ATE witness

published_prior_art.cite: BrunsSmithDukesFellerOgburn2024ABW: algebraic equivalences for augmented balancing weights/AutoDML-style estimators, not a finite-support strict DML-LRO-ADML risk-separation witness

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey missed van der Laan, Luedtke, and Carone 2024, 'Automatic doubly robust inference for linear functionals via calibrated debiased machine learning', which is a close comparator for Riesz/DML inference under one slow or inconsistent nuisance and should be separated from the proposed spectral triple frontier.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The witness conjecture assumes Assumption primitive-open, but that assumption already contains an existential finite-support/open-neighborhood nondegeneracy condition; rewrite it as pointwise primitive inequalities so the witness is not partly assumed.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add vanDerLaanLuedtkeCarone2024CDML to Related work and the Conjecture 1 novelty block, explicitly distinguishing DRAL/calibration under one slow nuisance from an iff pairwise DML/LRO/ADML spectral separation threshold.

Split Assumption primitive-open into non-existential finite-support inequalities for a candidate law, then let Conjecture 2 prove existence and openness of a three-point law satisfying those inequalities.

Add a small gap table for D-L, L-A, and D-A showing which projection difference and which consumer paper each frontier component targets; this would make the flagship axis-b claim harder to dismiss as three adjacent one-estimator facts.

recommended_next_step: Revise the literature comparison for C-DML and de-circularize the finite-support witness assumption before Stage 0.
